item.dc:creator: ParallelParkingInABurka

item.title: Just Funny X Things, Vol VI
item.dc:creator: TwitterLitter

item.title: Low Battery (Comic)
item.description: Hope you guys enjoy this comic! I wanted to make it about how maybe some people seem to have their lives together, when actually pretty much everyone needs their own time to restore their battery. For me personally I get burned out pretty quickly even from seemingly fun things like seeing friends etc. That’s why maybe if you’re drained it’s time to take a break for yourself. A REAL break where it’s just you and what you love. Obviously it’s easier said than done if you have family to look after, an intense job, health problems that may restrict you, or lots of commitments, but for those who do, I hope you can take time to take care of you! The wips for this comic are on my new patreon: miaminicomics! Not to be mistaken with the 18+patreon. Insta: miaminicomics
item.dc:creator: miaormoa

item.dc:creator: PePeCas

item.title: I’m ruining my life
item.description: Probably going to delete this. Been in a spiral since x-mas. Sometimes drinking half to a full bottle of whiskey a day. Recently did some really, really stupid shit that could have landed me in jail, which would make me lose my job, which would send me over the edge. My psych wants to send me to rehab, but I can’t miss work. I’m sabotaging everything and I’m lost. I’m taking a step back and doing at least dry march
item.dc:creator: tetriscrowley

item.dc:creator: bubblegumfaerie

item.title: Dump #194
item.description:
1 Hi! I’m Ashleigh and I collect and curate meme dumps. Just things that I saw over the last week or so.
2 I have been very busy preparing to exhibit at Emerald City Comic Con in Seattle next weekend! If you’re at the event, come see me in Artist Alley at table E-24! I have special goodies for folks on Imgur.
3 Wholesome
4 I would alter this to say like toxic masculine men rather than just “straight men”
5
6
7
8
9
10
11
12 Ugh, so satisfying. https://www.instagram.com/mountainrugcleaning?igsh=MXA4dnpvZDl3ZW9qcw==
13 It’s always so wobbly!
14 This could be us, but you playin’.
15 Oof.
16
17 +2 Serotonin
18 UGH. Wholesome.
19
20
21 Nyoooooom.
22
23 Ooooooooof
24
25 “Lord, give me a sign. What should I be?”
26 This is so me
27 Me for the past week.
28 Ope! It’s both.
29
30
31
32
33 Me every time people invite me out the same day.
34
35 5D@f
36
37
38 Eyebrows, eyebrows
39 EYEBROWS, EYEBROWS
40
41 If you see me staring off into space this is what’s happening.
42
43 This one made me ugly laugh.
44
45 Also my back hurts.
46 Okay, so, this is a whole kind of Las Vegas lore. This meme is fake, but this exact phrase has popped up all over Las Vegas. I saw one in the wild! No one really knows who Linda is, or what she did, or if she is actually a hoe.
47
48
49
50 *Blows kiss*
item.dc:creator: xbadxfaeriex

item.title: If you see some one stealing food, you didn’t see someone stealing food.
item.description:
Was buying some drinks in Greggs on the UK, member of staff was accusing the man of putting something in his jacket. The security guard from the mall came in and spoke to the man, who didn’t appear to be well mentally. All I heard the man say was “I’m hungry” and it has haunted me all day.
I felt bad that i didn’t do anything to assist, and offer to buy him some something. But the security guard is clearly a good human.
People around were also picking up on what was going on and also wanted to help. Am lying in bed thinking about it with the tears flowing. But i don’t want to stop feeling sad about it. I want it to give me fire to help someone.
item.dc:creator: mrleemur
